description: Claude Code settings for PocketTracker Android project

beforeStarting: Read SESSION_HISTORY.md to understand previous work and lessons learned
Read CLAUDE.md for project architecture overview
Check git status to see current state
Don't refactor core state management - current system works fine
beforeCommitting: Test basic functionality: launch, cursor movement, A/B buttons, navigation
Pre-commit hook will verify compilation automatically
development: Small incremental changes - test after each change
Use Android Studio Local History as safety net
CursorContext system works well - don't change it
When major breakage occurs - rollback first, debug second
